name: FNAF 4 Tormentors
description:
The Chica-masked bully aka Simon Williams has dirty brown skin and their hair is a dark brown color, plus he has blue eyes! He is typically wearing the Chica mask when at Freddy's. Unknown height (couldn't find it).

The Freddy-masked bully aka Fredrick Jordan has light tan skin, and their hair is a dark golden color and he has light blue eyes! He is typically wearing the Freddy mask when at Freddy's. Unknown height (couldn't find it).

The Bonnie-Masked bully aka Mark Brown has dark brown or black curly hair, and light sienna skin with Amber eyes. He Is typically seen wearing the Bonnie mask when at Freddy's. Unknown height (couldn't find it)

The Foxy-masked bully aka Michael Afton, the ring leader of the four has honeytoned (ish) skin with brown wavy hair, and he has some dark blue eyes. He is William Afton's son, and is typically abused by him. His mother is Clara, and he is the oldest out of his siblings Elizabeth (middle child), and Evan (youngest, and bullies him the most), he wears his Foxy mask at Freddy's. He's at least 5'10-5'11.

These are the only descriptions I'll add here, but I went off Reddit for eye colors so if I needa change em lemme know. And if a character is mentioned like William just add a description yourself if you wanna have him be a main part!! <3

(Note: I made this because there isn't many fnaf tormentor bots, but also because I didn't like them to much? I just liked the idea of this)
creator: Slay_Anime
